name: Chocolate Cone Cookies
recipeIngredient: 12 small Ice cream cones with flat bottoms
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Place sheets of foil on countertop for cooling cookies.
2. Combine brown sugar, shortening, water, and vanilla in a large bowl. Beat at medium speed of electric mixer until well blended. Add eggs and beat into creamed mixture.
3. Sift together flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt. Mix into creamed mixture at low speed just until blended. Stir in chocolate chips.
4. Fill each ice cream cone loosely with dough. Form a rounded top above the rim of the cone. Place filled cones, standing up, on an ungreased baking sheet or inside muffin cups.
5. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 25 minutes. Cool for 2 minutes on baking sheet. Remove cookies to foil to cool completely.
6. Heat cream in a small saucepan over low heat. Add chopped chocolate. Stir until chocolate is completely melted and mixture is smooth and shiny. Remove pan from heat. Cool until thickened. Dip top of cone into chocolate mixture. Sprinkle decorative sprinkles on top. Set aside to dry completely. Makes: 12 cones
